scripts.lint:server: bun --check apps/server/src/config.ts apps/server/src/db/schema.ts apps/server/src/db/client.ts apps/server/src/clients/showstart.ts apps/server/src/jobs/dailyReport.ts apps/server/src/server.ts apps/server/src/cli.ts apps/server/src/telegram/poller.ts apps/server/src/feishu/poller.ts apps/server/src/utils/datetime.ts apps/server/src/utils/logger.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/base.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/registry.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/config.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/database.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/dictionary.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/readFile.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/report.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/runMonitoring.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/search.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/showstart.ts apps/server/src/agent/tools/shows/telegram.ts apps/server/src/agent/runtime/agentRunner.ts
scripts.test:server: bun run apps/server/test/tools.test.ts && bun run apps/server/test/agent.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun run test:server && bun run test:telegram
